---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Protocols — Erika C. Freeman"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/build.py from data/protocols.yml — do not edit by hand. -->

::: {.section-label}
Protocols
:::
::: {.section-title}
protocols
:::

Methods from the lab, released openly on protocols.io as they are finalized — each with a citable DOI. DOIs appear here as protocols go live.

::: {.pubs-cols}

::: {.pubs-col style="grid-column: 1 / -1;"}

::: {.group-label}
In preparation
:::

::: {.pub}
Phytoplankton analysis with the FlowCAM
[protocols.io (from SOP 001-2016)]{.pub-venue}
[Existing SOP (Creed, Trick, Freeman, Oakes, 2016) to be re-released with a DOI.]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.group-label}
Planned
:::

::: {.pub}
DOM sampling and preservation for FT-ICR-MS
[protocols.io (planned)]{.pub-venue}
[Amber-vial, three-quarter fill, anti-crack freezing; connector-leaching QA. Adapted from the DOMseasons protocol (Tanentzap lab).]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
Solid-phase extraction (PPL) of dissolved organic matter
[protocols.io (planned)]{.pub-venue}
[Acidification, PPL cartridge conditioning, elution and drying for FT-ICR-MS.]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
FT-ICR-MS acquisition and quality control for DOM
[protocols.io (planned)]{.pub-venue}
[Instrument settings, calibration, blanks and QC for ultrahigh-resolution DOM.]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
Molecular formula assignment and data processing
[protocols.io (planned)]{.pub-venue}
[Peak picking, formula assignment, filtering and QC of FT-ICR-MS spectra.]{.pub-authors}
:::

::: {.pub}
AI-assisted molecular and structural annotation pipeline
[protocols.io (planned)]{.pub-venue}
[Machine-learning annotation of DOM spectra; sequenced to complement the structural-annotation paper and FreshDreaMS.]{.pub-authors}
:::

:::

:::
